ops.title: Backlog trio executed: procs hoisted to cc-interact v0.11.0; cc-guides is the installer single source; guard-edit removed from cc-present
ops.body:
Execution record for backlog tasks c5bc5af / cfa17c6 / db08b78 (2026-07-18), five repos shipped green.

**procs hoist (cc-interact v0.11.0, ad4079609adc).** `github.com/yasyf/cc-interact/procs` now owns window identity: `ClaudePID()` (sync.OnceValue nearest-claude-ancestor walk from `os.Getppid()`, 0 = outside any Claude window, a defined state), `LiveClaude(pid)` (argv-reverified via gopsutil — a pid recycled to a non-claude process reads dead), `FindAncestor`. Origin was cc-review's `internal/procs` (cc-present's copy was byte-identical); both consumers now import it with local copies deleted (cc-review 17d772cd1b0c, cc-present fa46ca4f2522).

**cc-orchestrate converted to walk semantics (17bc52f32003, user-elected).** Previously `ClaudePID: os.Getpid` + bare kill-0 `windowAlive`. Behavior deltas, all verified live after the sanctioned `~/.cc-orchestrate` wipe:
- A spawned agent's channel server now self-terminates when its claude dies (measured ~2s after `kill -9`; previously it kill-0'd its own pid, so the guard could never fire). The daemon and other sessions' channels survive.
- Watches inside a Claude window die with the window; a bare-terminal `cco agent watch` is pid-less (ClaudePID 0) and streams normally, never self-terminating.
- session-record stamps the real claude pid. Subjects are session-keyed throughout, so the identity change re-keys nothing.
- Keep-alive supervision races a hard-killed agent: it resumed the killed claude (`--resume`, same session id) before the daemon stopped — expected long-lived-sessions behavior, but kill-based tests must account for it.
- Testability rule enforced: helpers reached from tests take the pid via `cmd.Deps.ClaudePID` (threaded params), never call `procs.ClaudePID()` directly — the real walk's result depends on whether `go test` runs under a Claude window.

**Installer single source = cc-guides (premise correction on cfa17c6).** Canonical is `cc-skills:install-binary-{pinned,latest}` fragments, not plugin-template; render.sh's retired-design fetch machinery (tier chain, CC_SKILLS_REF pin, --sync-scripts, BREW_PACKAGE/BINARY_VERSION_MODE) is deleted in cc-interact v0.11.0. cc-present adopted the pinned fragment (resolves v<plugin.json version>); slop-cop's frozen copy joined the lineage (41abbdaeaec4 + re-render 952ebb40fe77). Review hardened the canonical: curl calls now carry `--connect-timeout`/`--max-time` (probe 30s / checksums 60s / binary 300s), and render.sh rejects `"` in token values (previously rendered invalid plugin.json silently).

**guard-edit (db08b78).** cc-present's GuardEditCmd wiring was vestigial on all three links (wired, never hooked, Gate nil by design) — removed at all four reference sites in fa46ca4f2522.
